effects.details: When you summon a Surveyor spirit card from your hand, treat the symbol color on this nexus and the symbol colors on all of your spirits that cost 3 as red, purple, white, yellow, green, and blue as well.
When one of your spirits that costs 3 or 5 attacks, place a core from the void onto it. If it is a Surveyor spirit, you may also link it to a spirit with Link , ignoring the link requirement.
